Off Calendar Mar-14-2016 Continued To Apr-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney John Murray to appear on April 25, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the receipt for deposit into a blocked account has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos & Deputy Neves. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Murray for and with Robert Quigley.

The Court stated that there were some technical matters but that the petition could be granted. Mr. Murray stated that the bond would be $1,027,000.00. The Court granted the amended petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Continued To Feb-26-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Robert Quigley (Petitioner in Pro Per).

The Court advised Mr. Quigley to get an attorney to correct the procedure defects listed in the Examiner's notes and that he will need to amended the petition and republish. The Petition for Probate of Will was continued to February 26, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
